_doc: Phase 1 metrics snapshot for the pilot dashboard — US-074 (SFB↔GitHub sync health) and US-078 (per-flow metrics + key-person-risk KPI). SNAPSHOT-DRIVEN BY DESIGN: Phase 1 avoids live Salesforce / ServiceNow API calls at dashboard-build time (US-074 scope 1, US-078 AC 'cleanly generated at Pages-deploy'), so this file is the single source. Update by hand (or a future sync job) — each edit is a committed, auditable data point. A metric carrying a non-empty "pending" is blocked on the noted dependency and renders as 'pending', NEVER as a fabricated number. Wire to live sources once #1121 (Flow B) / US-075 (Flow C) land.

key_person_risk.note: Ingrid's Matrix ↔ GitHub manual sync — the single-person dependency US-075 retires.

sync_health.pending: #1121 SF TCR → GitHub sync not live (US-072 / T1)
sync_health.source: Manual snapshot. Phase 1 measures Ingrid's manual-sync completeness; revisit a live SF API count when #1121 lands (US-074 scope 4).
